h7d9ebbfdg829eg4c4cgb9f1g0742cbf5768b: To master another's will, to kill with a mere thought - I've seen plenty in my day, but nothing like this.
h44854936g160cg4947gb0ecgd7b4bb065f35: *Your mind still aches from Nere's intrusion. Sheer, terrifying power.*
h051fd83eg65a6g4ad5g81dcg7edd81249fce: The True Souls aren't just a cult - they're an army. And the brain-bugs connect them. Connect us.
h361fcb42g7eb4g4be3g9714g03f0c7bba842: We can use this connection to earn their trust and gain an advantage.
h148d1d9fg9330g47e5ga3e6ge81ad3924d51: And then strike when the right moment arises. An excellent plan.
hfe850a45g15aeg4b49gb928g3f8c1d189de2: We'll seek out more True Souls, flush out the Absolute - and destroy them before its influence spreads further.
hc3771646g2338g4d71gb560g862489dd69a5: If they can learn such powers, so can we. Imagine how we could shape the world.
hcc5c591agd047g490ag8ff0g933163972687: To what end? To murder the innocent, to maim the weak, to form an army of our own?
h52138a18gfd31g4dafga09cgbc33fb2e4d7a: The actions of lunatics, tyrants - not legends.
h5f014d9fg48e1g42bbgb9bbg6c16c3c6cf4e: No. We must flush out the True Souls and destroy them. The Absolute's influence mustn't spread further.
h81032fcfg4ea5g4fd8ga368gddd5102cc07d: How have we avoided the Absolute's control so far?
h80ddaad5gdbf5g4349ga680g49addcb30765: The answer lies in our heads, lass - and these bugs aren't talking.
hfe5ce4e6ge400g47a5g9492g63ded41f49b7: The answer lies in our heads, lad - and these bugs aren't talking.
h894fa041ga300g41d2gb751g3df9cb5e3453: Here's what I do know: we've got a talent for flushing out True Souls.
hd339cda5gdb65g4e7ag89dbga988e0711353: We must silence them - and the Absolute - before their influence spreads further.
